title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Customs Tariff Act, 1975. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 2nd August, 1976, vide notification No. 398-Cus., dated 31st July, 1976, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
